content: If we treat the human linguistic reflective practice taught in high school English writing workshops as the base layer for AI agent self-improvement, we can build a two-stage self-refinement framework that mimics how humans learn to revise writing: first the general reflective check for tone, logic, and rhetorical fit, then iterative Self-Refine style targeted tweaks to fix specific flaws. This framework bridges human educational practice and LLM improvement to produce more human-aligned outputs than standalone AI self-refinement methods.
